title: Zorbit Event Envelope
description: Canonical event envelope for all Zorbit platform events. Every event published to Kafka must conform to this schema.

id.description: Unique event identifier using short hash format.

type.description: Event type following domain.entity.action naming convention.

source.description: Name of the service that produced the event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was produced.

namespace.description: Namespace context in which the event occurred.

type.description: Namespace type: G=Global, O=Organization, D=Department, U=User.

id.description: Namespace identifier using short hash format.

actor.description: The entity that triggered the event.

type.description: Type of actor: user, service, or system.

id.description: Actor identifier using short hash format.

data.description: Event-specific payload. Schema varies by event type.

correlationId.description: Correlation ID for distributed tracing across service boundaries.

causationId.description: ID of the event or request that caused this event.

version.description: Schema version of this event type.
